&SYSALVL.          = "2"
&SYSCLONE.         = "S1"
&SYSNAME.          = "SYS1"
&SYSOSLVL.         = "Z1020500"
&SYSPLEX.          = "PLEX1"
&SYSR1.            = "RES0S1"
##IPLINFO
IEE254I  06.26.05 IPLINFO DISPLAY 740

RELEASE z/OS 02.05.00    LICENSE = z/OS
